mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_REVIEW ( RESERV_ID, REVIEW, REVIEW_PICTURE, RATING, STATUS ) VALUES ( #{reservId}, #{review}, #{reviewPicture, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rating}, '정상' )
mapper.select: SELECT R.RESERV_ID, R.RESERV_TIME, R.GUEST_COUNT, R.RESERV_STATUS, R.CREATE_DATE, S.STORE_ID, S.STORE_NAME, S.STORE_ADDR, S.STORE_PHONE, CASE WHEN UR.RESERV_ID IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END AS HAS_REVIEW FROM RESERVATION R INNER JOIN STORE S ON R.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_REVIEW UR ON R.RESERV_ID = UR.RESERV_ID WHERE R.USER_ID = #{value} AND R.RESERV_STATUS = '승인' AND UR.RESERV_ID IS NULL ORDER BY R.CREATE_DATE DESC

SELECT R.RESERV_ID, R.RESERV_TIME, R.GUEST_COUNT, R.RESERV_STATUS, R.CREATE_DATE, S.STORE_ID, S.STORE_NAME, S.STORE_ADDR, S.STORE_PHONE, UR.REVIEW, UR.REVIEW_PICTURE, UR.RATING, UR.STATUS AS REVIEW_STATUS, 1 AS HAS_REVIEW FROM RESERVATION R INNER JOIN STORE S ON R.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID INNER JOIN USER_REVIEW UR ON R.RESERV_ID = UR.RESERV_ID WHERE R.USER_ID = #{value} AND UR.STATUS = '정상' ORDER BY UR.CREATE_DATE DESC

SELECT R.RESERV_ID, R.RESERV_TIME, R.GUEST_COUNT, R.RESERV_STATUS, R.CREATE_DATE, S.STORE_ID, S.STORE_NAME, S.STORE_ADDR, S.STORE_PHONE, UR.REVIEW, UR.REVIEW_PICTURE, UR.RATING, UR.STATUS AS REVIEW_STATUS FROM RESERVATION R INNER JOIN STORE S ON R.STORE_ID = S.STORE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_REVIEW UR ON R.RESERV_ID = UR.RESERV_ID WHERE R.RESERV_ID = #{value}
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_REVIEW SET STATUS = '삭제', UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE RESERV_ID = #{value}
